query:
SELECT a.id, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.status, s.nome as servicoNome, p.nome as profNome
FROM agendamentos a
LEFT JOIN servicos s ON s.id = a.servicoId
LEFT JOIN profissionais p ON p.id = a.profissionalId
WHERE a.clienteId = 450002;
